heading: POSTING OF TAX RATE AND BUDGET INFORMATION BY TAXING UNIT ON WEBSITE
operative_text: Each taxing unit shall maintain an Internet website or have access to a generally accessible Internet website that may be used for the purposes of this section. Each taxing unit shall post or cause to be posted on the Internet website the following information in a format prescribed by the comptroller:
_note: Lists 15 enumerated items that taxing units must post on their website, including governing body member names, contact information, budgets for preceding two years and current year, property tax revenue for M&O and debt service, adopted and proposed tax rates, and most recent financial audit. School districts follow subdivisions (11) and (14) for interest and sinking fund tax rates instead of debt service subdivisions.
